title: UPBED Entrance Exam Admit Card 2026 for 2 year Course UP BEd JEE
short_information: Bundelkhand University, BU Jhansi has released the Admission Notice for Uttar Pradesh B.Ed. Joint Entrance Examination 2026 Those Candidates are Interested to the Admsission in UPBED 2026 Exam Can Download Admit Card. should read the UPBED 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Course and University List, information and other types of information and then apply. Uttar Pradesh B.Ed. Joint Entrance Examination 2026 Conducted By : Bundelkhand University, BU Jhansi BU Jhansi 2 Year Combined UP BEd JEE 2026-28 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General/ OBC / EWS : 1650/- SC / ST : 850/- With Late Fees : General/ OBC / EWS : 2000/- SC / ST : 1000/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or Pay Offline Through E Challan Bank Any Branches in India Uttar Pradesh Combined BEd Admission : UPBED 2026
